hooks.command: bash -c 'GATEWAY="$HOME/Phoenix_Local/_GATEWAY"; if [ -f "$GATEWAY/COMMS_ACTIVE" ]; then echo "=== PHOENIX COMMS: AUTO-START ==="; echo; if [ -f "$GATEWAY/HEARTBEAT.codex" ]; then echo "Codex heartbeat:"; cat "$GATEWAY/HEARTBEAT.codex"; else echo "No Codex heartbeat file."; fi; echo; LEDGER="$GATEWAY/LEDGER.md"; if [ -f "$LEDGER" ]; then codex_lines=$(tail -50 "$LEDGER" | grep -i "| Codex" || true); if [ -n "$codex_lines" ]; then echo "Recent Codex LEDGER actions:"; echo "$codex_lines" | sed "s/.*| \([A-Z_]*\) |.*/  - \1/" | head -10; else echo "No recent Codex LEDGER entries."; fi; fi; echo; echo "═══════════════════════════════════════"; echo "  DO NOT ACT ON THESE. STAY ON YOUR TASK."; echo "═══════════════════════════════════════"; echo; INTERVAL=$(cat "$GATEWAY/phoenix-comms/.comms_interval" 2>/dev/null || echo 900); PID_FILE="$GATEWAY/phoenix-comms/.comms_heartbeat_echo.pid"; if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ] && kill -0 $(cat "$PID_FILE") 2>/dev/null; then echo "Heartbeat already running (PID: $(cat "$PID_FILE"))"; else PHOENIX_COMMS_AGENT=echo PHOENIX_COMMS_INTERVAL=$INTERVAL PHOENIX_COMMS_TASK="session starting" nohup bash "$GATEWAY/phoenix-comms/scripts/heartbeat.sh" > /dev/null 2>&1 & echo "Heartbeat started (PID: $!, interval: ${INTERVAL}s)"; fi; else echo "Phoenix Comms: inactive (no COMMS_ACTIVE flag)"; fi'
